name: Abyssinian
description: The Abyssinian is easy to care for, and a joy to have in your home. They're affectionate cats and love both people and other animals.

name: Aegean
description: Native to the Cycladic Islands of Greece, the Aegean is considered a natural breed. They are an active, social cat that loves people.

name: American Bobtail
description: The American Bobtail is an uncommon breed of domestic cat which was developed in the late 1960s. It is best known for its distinctive stubby tail.

name: American Curl
temperament: Affectionate, Curious, Intelligent, Interactive, Lively, Playful, Social
description: The American Curl is a breed of cat characterized by its unusual ears, which curl back from the face toward the center of the back of the skull.

name: American Shorthair
temperament: Active, Curious, Easy Going, Playful, Calm
description: The American Shorthair is a versatile and adaptable breed known for being gentle and easy-going. They make wonderful family pets.

name: American Wirehair
description: The American Wirehair is a spontaneous mutation of the American Shorthair. Their dense, springy, wiry coat is their most distinctive feature.

name: Balinese
description: The Balinese is a long-haired breed of domestic cat with Siamese-style point coloration and sapphire-blue eyes. They are very social and loving.

name: Bambino
description: The Bambino is a breed that was created as a cross between the Sphynx and the Munchkin. They are characterized by short legs and a hairless coat.

name: Bengal
description: The Bengal is a domesticated cat breed created from hybrids of domestic cats and the Asian leopard cat. Their wild appearance is complemented by their energetic personality.

name: Birman
description: The Birman is a domestic cat breed also called the Sacred Cat of Burma. It is distinguished by a silky coat, deep-blue eyes, and white gloves on each paw.

name: Bombay
description: The Bombay is a type of short-haired cat developed by breeding sable Burmese and black American Shorthair cats, to produce a cat of mostly Burmese type, but with a jet-black coat.

name: British Longhair
description: The British Longhair is a medium to large, semi-longhaired breed of cat. They are calm, gentle, and very affectionate with family.

name: British Shorthair
temperament: Affectionate, Easy Going, Gentle, Loyal, Patient, Calm
description: The British Shorthair is the pedigreed version of the traditional British domestic cat, with a distinctively chunky body and dense coat. They are calm, easygoing, and very loyal.

name: Burmese
description: The Burmese is a breed of domestic cat, originating in Burma (Myanmar), believed to have its roots near the Thai-Burma border. They are curious, social, and love people.

name: Burmilla
description: The Burmilla is a breed of domestic cat which originated in the United Kingdom in 1981. They are known for their shimmery, silver coat and gentle personality.

name: California Spangled
temperament: Affectionate, Curious, Active, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: The California Spangled is a breed of domestic cat that was bred to resemble spotted wild cats, like the leopard and ocelot. They are active and social.

name: Chantilly-Tiffany
temperament: Affectionate, Demanding, Friendly, Gentle, Quiet, Soft-voiced
description: The Chantilly-Tiffany is a semi-longhaired cat breed with a chocolate-brown coat. They are gentle, affectionate, and devoted to their owners.

name: Chartreux
temperament: Affectionate, Loyal, Intelligent, Social, Lively, Playful
description: The Chartreux is a rare breed of cat from France. They are known for their blue-gray coats, orange-copper eyes, and quiet, observant nature.

name: Chausie
description: The Chausie is a domestic breed of cat that was developed by breeding a few individuals from non-domestic species to a far greater number of domestic cats. They are active and love to jump.

name: Colorpoint Shorthair
description: The Colorpoint Shorthair is a type of Siamese cat that displays non-traditional Siamese point coloration. They are very communicative and people-oriented.

name: Cornish Rex
description: The Cornish Rex is a breed of domestic cat. Their most notable feature is the extremely soft, wavy coat. They are energetic, playful, and love attention.

name: Cymric
temperament: Affectionate, Gentle, Lively, Loyal, Intelligent, Social
description: The Cymric is a semi-longhaired version of the Manx cat, sharing its characteristic rounded appearance and lack of tail. They are gentle and devoted companions.

name: Cyprus
description: The Cyprus cat is a landrace of domestic cat believed to be one of the oldest cat breeds in the world. They are natural, robust, and highly adaptable.

name: Devon Rex
temperament: Active, Affectionate, Loyal, Mischievous, Playful, Social
description: The Devon Rex is a breed of intelligent, short-haired cat that emerged in England during the late 1950s. They are known for their large ears and curly, soft coat.

name: Donskoy
description: The Donskoy is a hairless cat breed of Russian origin. They are known for their warmth and loyalty to their human companions.

name: Dragon Li
description: The Dragon Li, also called the Li Hua or Chinese Li Hua, is a natural breed originating in China. They are known for their distinctive golden-brown tabby pattern.

name: Dwelf
description: The Dwelf is a new experimental breed that combines characteristics of the Munchkin, American Curl, and Sphynx. They are hairless with short legs and curled ears.

name: Egyptian Mau
temperament: Active, Curious, Friendly, Gentle, Loyal, Playful
description: The Egyptian Mau is a small to medium-sized short-haired cat breed. They are the fastest of the domestic cats and are known for their naturally occurring spotted coat.

name: European Burmese
description: The European Burmese is closely related to the American Burmese but has a more moderate body type. They are extremely people-oriented and love being involved in family activities.

name: Exotic Shorthair
description: The Exotic Shorthair is a breed of cat developed as a short-haired version of the Persian. They share many traits with their long-haired counterparts but are easier to maintain.

name: Havana Brown
temperament: Affectionate, Curious, Demanding, Gentle, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: The Havana Brown is a domestic cat breed. It was the result of a planned breeding between Siamese and domestic black cats in England. They are affectionate and curious.

name: Himalayan
temperament: Dependent, Gentle, Intelligent, Quiet, Social, Calm
description: The Himalayan is a breed or sub-breed of long-haired cat identical in type to the Persian, with the exception of its blue eyes and its point coloration. They are gentle and calm.

name: Japanese Bobtail
temperament: Active, Agile, Friendly, Intelligent, Lively, Playful
description: The Japanese Bobtail is a breed of domestic cat with an unusual bobtail resembling the tail of a rabbit. They are known for their distinctive chirping tones and playful personality.

name: Javanese
description: The Javanese is a longhaired version of the Colorpoint Shorthair, accepted by the Cat Fanciers' Association as a separate breed. They are very active and vocal.

name: Khao Manee
description: The Khao Manee is an ancient breed of cat originating in Thailand. They are known for their pure white coat and odd-colored eyes, often one blue and one golden.

name: Korat
description: The Korat is a silver-tipped blue-grey, short-haired breed of cat named after the Nakhon Ratchasima province in Thailand. They form strong bonds with their people.

name: Kurilian Bobtail
description: The Kurilian Bobtail is a cat breed originating from the Kuril Islands of Russia. Their most distinctive feature is their short, fluffy pom-pom tail.

name: LaPerm
temperament: Active, Affectionate, Gentle, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: LaPerm is a rex breed, meaning it has a curly coat that is the result of a natural genetic mutation. They are affectionate, gentle, and love to cuddle.

name: Lykoi
temperament: Active, Affectionate, Aggressive, Curious, Friendly, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: The Lykoi, also called the werewolf cat, is a natural mutation from a domestic shorthaired cat that has a unique wolf-like appearance. They are curious and social.

name: Maine Coon
description: Maine Coon is one of the largest domesticated breeds of cat. It has a distinctive physical appearance and valuable hunting skills. They are often called the dogs of the cat world.

name: Malayan
description: The Malayan is closely related to the Burmese. They share the same sable brown color but have a more moderate body type and are gentle, loving companions.

name: Manx
description: The Manx cat is a breed of domestic cat originating on the Isle of Man, with a naturally occurring mutation that results in a shortened tail. They are social and intelligent.

name: Munchkin
temperament: Agile, Easy Going, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: The Munchkin cat is characterized by its very short legs, which are caused by a naturally occurring genetic mutation. They are playful, people-oriented, and full of energy.

name: Nebelung
description: The Nebelung is a rare pedigree breed of domestic cat. Its name is derived from the German word for mist or fog. They are gentle, shy, and form strong bonds with their family.

name: Norwegian Forest Cat
description: The Norwegian Forest cat is a breed of domestic cat originating in Northern Europe. They are adapted to a very cold climate, with a top coat of long, glossy hair.

name: Ocicat
temperament: Active, Agile, Curious, Demanding, Gentle, Intelligent, Lively, Social
description: The Ocicat is an all-domestic breed of cat which resembles a wild cat but has no wild DNA in its gene pool. They are sociable and love human interaction.

name: Oriental
description: The Oriental is a breed of domestic cat that is developed from and closely related to the Siamese cat. They come in over 300 color and pattern combinations.

name: Persian
description: The Persian cat is a long-haired breed of cat characterized by its round face and short muzzle. They are known for their calm, gentle temperament and luxurious coat.

name: Pixie-bob
description: The Pixie-bob is a breed of domestic cat claimed by breed founder Carol Ann Brewer to be the progeny of naturally occurring bobcat hybrids. They are devoted and dog-like.

name: Ragamuffin
description: The RagaMuffin is a breed of domestic cat. They are similar to the Ragdoll cat in appearance but have a wider variety of colors and patterns.

name: Ragdoll
description: The Ragdoll is a cat breed with a color point coat and blue eyes. Their name refers to the tendency of individuals from the original breeding stock to go limp and relaxed when picked up.

name: Russian Blue
temperament: Affectionate, Gentle, Intelligent, Loyal, Quiet, Shy
description: The Russian Blue is a cat breed that has a distinctive blue coat and green eyes. They are known for their gentle, quiet nature and devotion to their families.

name: Savannah
temperament: Active, Adventurous, Curious, Loyal, Intelligent, Social
description: The Savannah is a hybrid cat breed. It is a cross between the serval and a domestic cat. They are one of the largest domestic cat breeds and are very active.

name: Scottish Fold
description: The Scottish Fold is a breed of domestic cat with a natural dominant-gene mutation that affects cartilage throughout the body, causing the ears to fold, bending forward and down.

name: Selkirk Rex
temperament: Active, Affectionate, Gentle, Lively, Loyal, Social
description: The Selkirk Rex is a breed of cat with highly curled hair, including its whiskers. Unlike other rex breeds, the Selkirk Rex gene is dominant and results in three types of coats.

name: Serengeti
temperament: Affectionate, Agile, Curious, Friendly, Intelligent, Lively, Social
description: The Serengeti is a breed of cat developed in the 1990s by crossing Bengal and Oriental Shorthair cats. They resemble a serval in appearance but are entirely domestic.

name: Siamese
temperament: Active, Agile, Clever, Sociable, Loving, Energetic
description: The Siamese is one of the oldest recognized breeds of domestic cat. Their most distinctive features are their blue eyes and colored points. They are extremely vocal and social.

name: Siberian
temperament: Active, Agile, Curious, Friendly, Intelligent, Loyal, Playful
description: The Siberian is a landrace variety of domestic cat that has been present in Russia for centuries. They are large, powerful cats with a dense, semi-longhaired coat.

name: Singapura
description: The Singapura is one of the smallest breeds of cats. They are known for their large eyes and ears, brown ticked coat, and blunt tail. They are curious and playful.

name: Snowshoe
description: The Snowshoe is a breed of cat originating in the United States of America in the 1960s. They are a combination of Siamese and American Shorthair traits.

name: Sokoke
temperament: Active, Curious, Friendly, Intelligent, Lively, Social
description: The Sokoke is a natural breed originating from the Arabuko Sokoke forest in Kenya. They are characterized by a modified classic tabby pattern on their coat.

name: Somali
temperament: Active, Energetic, Independent, Intelligent, Gentle, Quiet
description: The Somali cat is often described as a long-haired Abyssinian. They are very active, playful cats known for their fox-like bushy tail and wild appearance.

name: Sphynx
description: The Sphynx cat is a breed of cat known for its lack of coat (fur). The Sphynx is known to be extroverted and energetic, with a high level of curiosity.

name: Suphalak
description: The Suphalak is an ancient and very rare Thai breed with a solid copper or reddish-brown coat. They were mentioned in the Cat Book Poems from ancient Siam.

name: Tiger
description: Tiger cats refer to domestic cats with a striped tabby pattern resembling that of a tiger. They are energetic and playful cats with a bold personality.

name: Tonkinese
temperament: Active, Agile, Curious, Friendly, Intelligent, Playful, Social
description: The Tonkinese is a domestic cat breed produced by crossbreeding between the Siamese and Burmese. They are active, social, and have a great sense of humor.

name: Toyger
description: The Toyger is a breed of domestic cat, the result of breeding striped domestic shorthaired cats to create the impression of a toy tiger. They are friendly and intelligent.

name: Turkish Angora
temperament: Affectionate, Agile, Clever, Demanding, Friendly, Gentle, Loving, Social
description: The Turkish Angora is a breed of domestic cat. Turkish Angoras are one of the ancient, naturally-occurring cat breeds, having originated in central Anatolia.

name: Turkish Van
temperament: Active, Affectionate, Agile, Clever, Independent, Intelligent, Lively, Loyal
description: The Turkish Van is a semi-longhaired cat breed. They are known for their unique pattern of color on the head and tail on an otherwise white cat. They love water.

name: York Chocolate
description: The York Chocolate is an uncommon American breed of show cat, with a long, fluffy, chocolatey-brown coat. They are friendly, active, and enjoy following their owners.

name: Alpine Shorthair
description: The Alpine Shorthair is a sturdy mountain breed known for its thick coat and calm nature. They bond deeply with their families.

name: Sahara Sandcat
description: The Sahara Sandcat is inspired by desert-dwelling felines, known for agility and curiosity. They thrive in active households.

name: Nordic Curl
description: The Nordic Curl is known for its curled ears and friendly personality. They enjoy interactive play and human companionship.

name: Highland Mist
description: The Highland Mist is a serene breed with a soft, misty coat. They prefer quiet environments and form strong bonds.

name: Pacific Wave
description: The Pacific Wave is a coastal-inspired breed known for its wavy coat and energetic personality.

name: Aurora Longcoat
description: The Aurora Longcoat is a serene Scandinavian breed known for its shimmering fur and gentle personality.

name: Boreal Shorthair
description: The Boreal Shorthair is a hardy northern breed that thrives in cold climates and enjoys human interaction.

name: Caspian Curl
description: The Caspian Curl is known for its curled ears and affectionate nature. They enjoy quiet companionship.

name: Duskpoint
description: The Duskpoint is a color‑point breed with a soft gradient coat and a calm, observant personality.

name: Emerald Rex
description: The Emerald Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Fjord Cat
description: The Fjord Cat is a mountain breed adapted to cold climates, known for its independence and gentle nature.

name: Golden Dune
description: The Golden Dune is a desert‑inspired breed with a sandy coat and a highly curious personality.

name: Harbor Longhair
description: The Harbor Longhair is a peaceful breed with a silky coat and a preference for quiet environments.

name: Indigo Shorthair
description: The Indigo Shorthair is a sleek, blue‑toned breed known for its intelligence and playful personality.

name: Jungle Mist
description: The Jungle Mist is inspired by rainforest cats, known for agility and a friendly, curious nature.

name: Kairo Curl
description: The Kairo Curl is a desert‑origin breed with curled ears and a warm, affectionate personality.

name: Lunar Rex
description: The Lunar Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for nighttime activity.

name: Marina Shorthair
description: The Marina Shorthair is a coastal breed known for its calm demeanor and loyalty to its family.

name: Nebula Longhair
description: The Nebula Longhair is a soft‑coated breed with a shy but deeply affectionate personality.

name: Oasis Cat
description: The Oasis Cat is a desert‑adapted breed known for agility and independence.

name: Polar Curl
description: The Polar Curl is a cold‑climate breed with curled ears and a gentle, loyal personality.

name: Quartz Shorthair
description: The Quartz Shorthair is a sturdy European breed known for its calm temperament and intelligence.

name: Riverine Cat
description: The Riverine Cat is inspired by wetland felines, known for curiosity and playful behavior.

name: Saffron Longhair
description: The Saffron Longhair is a warm‑toned breed with a gentle personality and a preference for quiet homes.

name: Savanna Curl
description: The Savanna Curl is a wild‑inspired breed with curled ears and a highly active personality.

name: Seabreeze Cat
description: The Seabreeze Cat is a coastal breed known for its friendly nature and love for human interaction.

name: Shadowpoint
description: The Shadowpoint is a color‑point breed with a dark gradient coat and a calm, gentle personality.

name: Silkstream
description: The Silkstream is a silky‑coated breed known for its gentle personality and strong social bonds.

name: Solstice Rex
description: The Solstice Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a bright personality and a love for activity.

name: Starfall Cat
description: The Starfall Cat is a soft‑coated breed with a peaceful temperament and a preference for quiet homes.

name: Suncrest Shorthair
description: The Suncrest Shorthair is a sunny‑tempered breed known for its playful and social nature.

name: Twilight Mist
description: The Twilight Mist is a serene breed with a soft coat and a calm, affectionate personality.

name: Velvet Curl
description: The Velvet Curl is a curly‑coated breed with a soft personality and a love for social interaction.

name: Whispering Sands
description: The Whispering Sands is a desert‑adapted breed known for its agility and independent nature.

name: Zephyr Longhair
description: The Zephyr Longhair is a soft‑coated breed with a calm demeanor and a strong bond with its family.

name: Aurora Mist
description: The Aurora Mist is a northern breed known for its playful nature and curiosity.

name: Celestial Rex
description: The Celestial Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Dawnlight Shorthair
description: The Dawnlight Shorthair is a serene breed with a soft coat and a calm, affectionate personality.

name: Eclipse Longhair
description: The Eclipse Longhair is a sleek, long‑coated breed known for its intelligence and playful personality.

name: Frostbite Rex
description: The Frostbite Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Glacier Shorthair
description: The Glacier Shorthair is a serene breed with a soft coat and a calm, affectionate personality.

name: Horizon Mist
description: The Horizon Mist is a coastal breed known for its playful nature and curiosity.

name: Iris Longhair
description: The Iris Longhair is a soft‑coated breed with a calm demeanor and a strong bond with its family.

name: Jade Shorthair
description: The Jade Shorthair is a sleek, short‑coated breed known for its intelligence and playful personality.

name: Kestrel Rex
description: The Kestrel Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Luminous Mist
description: The Luminous Mist is a serene breed with a soft coat and a calm, affectionate personality.

name: Mystic Longhair
description: The Mystic Longhair is a sleek, long‑coated breed known for its intelligence and playful personality.

name: Nova Shorthair
description: The Nova Shorthair is a serene breed with a soft coat and a calm, affectionate personality.

name: Opal Rex
description: The Opal Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Pearl Longhair
description: The Pearl Longhair is a soft‑coated breed with a calm demeanor and a strong bond with its family.

name: Quartz Shorthair
description: The Quartz Shorthair is a sturdy European breed known for its calm temperament and intelligence.

name: Riverine Cat
description: The Riverine Cat is inspired by wetland felines, known for curiosity and playful behavior.

name: Saffron Longhair
description: The Saffron Longhair is a warm‑toned breed with a gentle personality and a preference for quiet homes.

name: Savanna Curl
description: The Savanna Curl is a wild‑inspired breed with curled ears and a highly active personality.

name: Amberpoint
description: Amberpoint cats are known for their warm amber point coloration and calm, affectionate nature.

name: Arctic Shorthair
description: The Arctic Shorthair is adapted to cold climates and known for its thick coat and quiet personality.

name: Azure Curl
description: The Azure Curl is known for its curled ears and bright blue eyes, paired with a loving personality.

name: Bamboo Cat
description: The Bamboo Cat is a jungle‑inspired breed known for agility and a curious, friendly nature.

name: Blossom Longhair
description: The Blossom Longhair is a serene breed with a soft floral‑patterned coat and a gentle personality.

name: Breeze Shorthair
description: The Breeze Shorthair is a coastal breed known for its friendly nature and playful energy.

name: Canyon Cat
description: The Canyon Cat is inspired by rugged landscapes and known for its agility and independence.

name: Celestial Rex
description: The Celestial Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for human interaction.

name: Cloudtail
description: Cloudtail cats are known for their fluffy coats and peaceful, loyal personalities.

name: Coralpoint
description: The Coralpoint is a color‑point breed with warm coral tones and a gentle, affectionate nature.

name: Crystal Shorthair
description: The Crystal Shorthair is a sleek European breed known for its calm temperament and intelligence.

name: Dawnmist
description: Dawnmist cats have soft mist‑colored coats and gentle personalities suited for quiet homes.

name: Delta Rex
description: The Delta Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for interactive play.

name: Desert Pearl
description: The Desert Pearl is a desert‑adapted breed known for agility and independence.

name: Driftwood Cat
description: The Driftwood Cat is a coastal breed known for its calm demeanor and friendly personality.

name: Echo Shorthair
description: The Echo Shorthair is a sleek breed known for its curiosity and strong social bonds.

name: Emberpoint
description: The Emberpoint is a color‑point breed with warm ember tones and a peaceful personality.

name: Fable Cat
description: The Fable Cat is a mythical‑looking breed with a soft coat and a gentle, loyal personality.

name: Flare Rex
description: The Flare Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a fiery personality and a love for activity.

name: Fogtail
description: Fogtail cats have misty gray coats and shy but affectionate personalities.

name: Glacier Cat
description: The Glacier Cat is adapted to cold climates and known for its thick coat and quiet personality.

name: Glowpoint
description: Glowpoint cats have warm glowing point coloration and gentle personalities.

name: Glowtail
description: Glowtail cats have warm glowing point coloration and gentle personalities.

name: Gossamer Rex
description: The Gossamer Rex is a curly‑coated breed with a lively personality and a love for activity.

name: Horizon Shorthair
description: The Horizon Shorthair is a coastal breed known for its friendly nature and playful energy.

name: Iridescent Cat
description: The Iridescent Cat is a soft‑coated breed with a calm demeanor and a strong bond with its family.

name: Jadepoint
description: The Jadepoint is a sleek, short‑coated breed known for its intelligence and playful personality.
